positive: A detailed, whimsical illustration of a celestial woodland scene. The central subject is a gentle, bioluminescent forest fox sitting within the roots of an ancient, glowing tree. Overhead, stylized constellation figures (like crescent moons, shooting stars, and small planetary clusters) are visible through the canopy. The atmosphere is mystical and serene. Use a Japanese woodblock print (Ukiyo-e) aesthetic blended with modern vector graphics. The color palette should be deep indigo, sapphire blue, emerald green, and luminous gold, with stark black outlines for defining silhouettes. Composition must be centralized, highly contrasting, and symmetrical. Clean lines, maximal detail in flora, minimalist in background clutter. Print on white/light fabric surface look.
negative: blur, grain, noise, low resolution, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, copyright, logo, extra limbs, bad anatomy, messy, busy background, photorealistic, 3d render
